    Precise inking, natural feeling

    Surface Slim Pen

    1 images

    Surface Slim Pen

    This was added to your wishlist.

    You added Surface Slim Pen to your wish list. You can share this list with others.

    View wish list
    Turn your ideas into reality with Surface Slim Pen. Take handwritten notes and draw with a pen-on-paper feeling thanks to its exceptional accuracy and pressure sensitivity. Magnetic attachment makes it simple to store and charge.

    $129.99

    Flexible payments available with PayPal.
    Learn more

    Out of stock

    Free 2-3 day shipping.

    Buying for your Business? Go to

    Surface Slim Pen for Business

    $116.99 Special pricing for eligible students, parents, teachers and military. May not be combinable with other offers.

    Check your eligibility

    Overview Tech specs Sustainability

    Our most advanced pen

    Slim and comfortable

    The flat design is easy to hold and control for better usage.

    Precise and accurate

    A sharper pen tip helps  you put a finer point on everything you do with exceptional accuracy and greater control.

    Excellent shading

    Precise tilting and 4,096 points of pressure sensitivity deliver an incredible shading experience.

    Inking feels more natural

    Feel the difference with customizable haptic feedback,1 which adapts to whether you’re using a thin brush or a thick marker.

    Converts your handwriting

    Write instead of type thanks to the ability to convert your handwriting into text across search boxes, documents, and more in Windows 11.

    Supports multiple languages

    Ink Anywhere recognizes multiple languages, making it more accessible for non-English speakers.

    Simplify tasks with AI

    Turn your ideas into images

    Exclusive to Copilot+ PCs, describe or draw your vision and watch AI-powered Cocreator produce an interpretation of it.2

    Summarize handwritten notes

    With Surface Slim Pen, write notes in OneNote, then get help from Copilot to summarize them.2

    Always where you left it, charged and ready to go

    Stay in your flow

    Surface Slim Pen has all day battery life4 and magnetically charges wirelessly with Surface Laptop Studio, select Surface Pro keyboards, and the 12-inch Surface Pro.3

    Avoid unintentional marks

    Rest your hand on the screen while using Surface Slim Pen without causing unintended marks or actions thanks to palm rejection technology.

    Access apps quickly

    Remove the pen from its storage tray to see customizable app shortcuts in the pen menu on Windows 11.

    Custom actions and settings

    Use programable buttons to enhance your experience, including click actions and writing hand preferences.

    End of Shop other products

    Why buy from Microsoft Store

    Free 2-3 day shipping

    Free shipping at no cost, no minimum amount.
    Learn more about shipping

    Buy now, pay later. As low as 0% APR.

    Flexible payment options help you pay how you want, at Microsoft Store.
    Learn about flexible payment options

    Microsoft Complete

    Get coverage on accidental damage for up to four years. Shop smarter with Microsoft Complete and get technical support as well.
    Learn about Microsoft Complete

    Free 60-day returns

    Return almost any physical product within 60 days in like-new condition in its original packaging for a full refund. Some exclusions apply.
    Learn about returns
    Learn about all the benefits of shopping at Microsoft Store​
    Discounts: Supplies limited. Actual savings depends on product availability.
    • Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
    • Price protection: Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new or refurbished consumer and commercial physical products made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes commercial and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. Both price adjustments: Price Adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support with your Microsoft Account information and any other information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment total per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers.

    • Trade-In: Available only through the Microsoft Store online in the United States. Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of a qualifying device (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, or video game console). To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

      This offer is operated by Teladvance, LLC and is not sponsored by Microsoft. Any appraised value will be determined at trade in and provided by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval.
    [1] Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition) experiences and compatibility vary by which Surface device you are using it with. Visit Surface Slim Pen Compatibility to learn more.
    • [2] Available now on Copilot+ PCs with Snapdragon® X Series processors and on other devices starting early 2025. Optimized for English text prompts and requires a Microsoft account and internet connection to access cloud services that help ensure the responsible use of AI. Visit Copilot+ PCs FAQs to learn more.
    • [3] Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition) can charge with Surface Pro, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch, Surface Slim Pen Charger, Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard, Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage, and Surface Laptop Studio. All are sold separately. Visit Surface Slim Pen Compatibility to learn more.
    • [4] Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.

    Designed for1
    See Compatibility Details2

    Size and weight
    Length: 5.38 inch (137 mm)
    Width: 0.44 inch (11.3 mm) 
    Height: 0.25 inch (6.3 mm)
    Weight: 0.03 lbs (13 g)

    Exterior
    Material: Plastic enclosure
    Color: Matte Black

    Buttons
    Side button, Top Button with eraser functionality

    Haptic feedback

    Haptic feedback functionality compatible only with Windows 11:

    See Compatibility Details

    Pressure Sensitivity
    4,096 pressure levels
    Zero force inking

    Battery
    • Rechargeable Lithium Ion
    • All-day battery life3

    Connection
    Bluetooth® Wireless 5.0 Technology

    Battery capacities
    • Battery Capacity Nominal (Wh) 0.171
    • Battery Capacity Min (Wh) 0.164

    Storage and charging1

    Integrated storage and charging on the back of Surface Pro, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch

    Slim Pen storage and charging in Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage, Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard, Surface Pro Signature Keyboard, Surface Laptop Studio and Surface Slim Pen USB-C Charging Base4

    What’s in the box
    • Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition)
    • Quick Start Guide
    • Safety and warranty documents

    Warranty5
    1-year limited warranty
    [1] Chargers, software, accessories, and devices sold separately. Availability may vary by market.
    • [2] Additional compatibility details can be found at Surface Slim Pen Compatibility. Pairing functionality requires Windows 10, Windows 11, or Android with the latest updates.
    • [3] Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
    • [4] The USB-C Charging Base that came in-box with Surface Slim Pen requires a firmware update through Windows Update to charge Surface Slim Pen. Visit Surface Slim Pen Charger Update for more information.
    • [5] Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights.

    Designed with sustainability in mind

    Improving the sustainability of our devices starts with hardware design. We work to create devices that are built with integrity and with reduced waste and carbon impact across their life cycles. Learn more about sustainability at Surface

    Advancing sustainability in the supply chain

    To meet our goal of 100% carbon-free electricity by 2030, 40% of our key device suppliers have already transitioned to CFE in FY24.

    Electric vehicle delivery 

    We have expanded truckload electric vehicle capabilities to cover both of our United States distribution centers, enabling full truckloads within a 100-mile range of the distribution centers to be delivered via electric vehicle.
